commands.name: activity
commands.description: Get agent activity state (idle/busy/error) for all agents in a session.

parameters.name: activity-type
parameters.description: Filter by agent type: claude, codex, gemini

commands.name: context
commands.description: Get context window usage estimates for all agents in a session.

commands.name: dashboard
commands.description: Dashboard summary as markdown or JSON.

commands.name: diagnose
commands.description: Comprehensive health check with fix recommendations.

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Compare agent activity and file changes over time.

commands.name: files
commands.description: Get file changes with agent attribution and conflict detection.

commands.name: health
commands.description: Get session or project health status.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Session for per-agent health, empty for project health

commands.name: health-restart-stuck
commands.description: Detect and restart agents stuck with no output for N minutes.

commands.name: inspect-pane
commands.description: Detailed pane inspection with state detection and optional code block parsing.

commands.name: markdown
commands.description: System state as markdown tables.

commands.name: metrics
commands.description: Session metrics export for analysis.

commands.name: probe
commands.description: Active pane responsiveness probe using keystroke or interrupt methods.

parameters.name: probe-aggressive
parameters.description: Fallback to interrupt_test if keystroke_echo fails

commands.name: snapshot
commands.description: Unified state query: sessions + beads + alerts + mail. Use --since for delta snapshots.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Get tmux sessions, panes, and agent states. The primary entry point for understanding current system state.

commands.name: summary
commands.description: Get session activity summary with agent metrics.

commands.name: tail
commands.description: Capture recent output from panes. Useful for checking agent progress or errors.

commands.name: terse
commands.description: Single-line encoded state for minimal token usage.

commands.name: watch-bead
commands.description: Capture recent mentions of a bead across panes and report current bead status.

commands.name: ensemble
commands.description: Get ensemble state for a session including modes, status, and synthesis readiness.

commands.name: ensemble-modes
commands.description: List available reasoning modes with filtering by category and tier.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category code (A-L) or name (Formal, Heuristic, etc.)

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Filter by tier: core, advanced, experimental, all

commands.name: ensemble-presets
commands.description: List available ensemble presets with their mode configurations and budgets.

commands.name: ensemble-synthesize
commands.description: Trigger synthesis for an ensemble session, combining mode outputs into a unified report.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Session name with ensemble to synthesize

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: Synthesis strategy: manual, adversarial, consensus, creative, analytical, deliberative, prioritized, dialectical, meta-reasoning, voting, argumentation-graph

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Path to write the synthesis report

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Synthesize even if some outputs are incomplete

commands.name: ensemble_spawn
commands.description: Spawn a reasoning ensemble session with mode assignments.

parameters.name: preset
parameters.description: Ensemble preset name (required unless --modes is set)

parameters.name: question
parameters.description: Question for the ensemble to analyze

parameters.name: assignment
parameters.description: Assignment strategy: round-robin, affinity, category, explicit

commands.name: ack
commands.description: Watch for agent responses after sending a message.

commands.name: assign
commands.description: Get work distribution recommendations for assigning beads to agents.

commands.name: interrupt
commands.description: Send Ctrl+C to stop agents, optionally send a new task.

parameters.name: interrupt-msg
parameters.description: New task to send after Ctrl+C

commands.name: restart-pane
commands.description: Restart pane process (kill and respawn agent).

commands.name: route
commands.description: Get routing recommendation for work distribution.

parameters.name: route-strategy
parameters.description: Strategy: least-loaded, first-available, round-robin, random, sticky, explicit

commands.name: send
commands.description: Send message to panes atomically. Supports type filtering and tracking.

parameters.name: enter
parameters.description: Send Enter after paste (default true). Alias: --submit

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by agent type: claude|cc, codex|cod, gemini|gmi

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Wait for agents to reach a specific state.

parameters.name: wait-until
parameters.description: Wait condition: idle, complete, generating, healthy

parameters.name: wait-any
parameters.description: Wait for ANY agent instead of ALL

parameters.name: wait-exit-on-error
parameters.description: Exit immediately if ERROR state detected

commands.name: recipes
commands.description: List available spawn recipes/presets.

commands.name: spawn
commands.description: Create session with agents.

parameters.name: spawn-preset
parameters.description: Use recipe preset instead of counts

parameters.name: spawn-label
parameters.description: Goal label for multi-session support (creates SESSION--LABEL)

commands.name: bead-claim
commands.description: Claim a bead for work.

commands.name: bead-close
commands.description: Close a bead.

commands.name: bead-create
commands.description: Create a new bead.

parameters.name: bead-type
parameters.description: Type: task, bug, feature, epic, chore

commands.name: bead-show
commands.description: Show bead details.

commands.name: beads-list
commands.description: List beads with filtering options.

parameters.name: beads-status
parameters.description: Filter by status: open, in_progress, closed, blocked

parameters.name: beads-type
parameters.description: Filter by type: task, bug, feature, epic, chore

commands.name: file-beads
commands.description: Get bead mappings for a file from bv.

commands.name: file-hotspots
commands.description: Get file hotspot analysis from bv.

commands.name: file-relations
commands.description: Get file co-change relations from bv.

commands.name: forecast
commands.description: Get ETA predictions from bv.

commands.name: graph
commands.description: Get dependency graph insights.

commands.name: impact
commands.description: Get file impact analysis from bv.

commands.name: label-attention
commands.description: Get attention-ranked labels from bv.

commands.name: label-flow
commands.description: Get cross-label dependency flow from bv.

commands.name: label-health
commands.description: Get per-label health metrics from bv.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Get bv execution plan with parallelizable tracks.

commands.name: search
commands.description: Run semantic search against beads via bv.

commands.name: suggest
commands.description: Get hygiene suggestions from bv.

commands.name: triage
commands.description: Get bv triage analysis with recommendations, quick wins, and blockers.

commands.name: cass-context
commands.description: Get relevant past context for a task.

commands.name: cass-search
commands.description: Search past agent conversations.

commands.name: cass-status
commands.description: Get CASS health and statistics.

commands.name: pipeline-cancel
commands.description: Cancel a running pipeline.

commands.name: pipeline-list
commands.description: List all tracked pipelines.

commands.name: pipeline-run
commands.description: Run a workflow pipeline.

commands.name: pipeline-status
commands.description: Get pipeline status.

commands.name: acfs-status
commands.description: Get setup status via ACFS (core tool availability).

commands.name: alerts
commands.description: List active alerts with filtering.

parameters.name: alerts-severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity: info, warning, error, critical

commands.name: capabilities
commands.description: Get complete list of robot mode commands and their parameters (this command).

commands.name: dcg-check
commands.description: Preflight a shell command via DCG (no execution). Aliases: --robot-guard, --cmd.

commands.name: dcg-status
commands.description: Show DCG status and configuration.

commands.name: dismiss-alert
commands.description: Dismiss an alert.

commands.name: docs
commands.description: Get documentation for a topic in JSON format. Topics: quickstart, commands, examples, exit-codes.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Documentation topic. Empty returns topic index.

commands.name: giil-fetch
commands.description: Download image from share URL via giil and return JSON metadata.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Share URL (iCloud, Dropbox, Google Photos, Google Drive)

commands.name: help
commands.description: Get AI agent help documentation.

commands.name: history
commands.description: Get command history for a session.

commands.name: jfp-bundles
commands.description: List JFP bundles.

commands.name: jfp-categories
commands.description: List JFP categories with counts.

commands.name: jfp-export
commands.description: Export JFP prompt(s) by ID.

commands.name: jfp-install
commands.description: Install JFP prompt(s) by ID.

commands.name: jfp-installed
commands.description: List installed Claude Code skills from JFP.

commands.name: jfp-list
commands.description: List JFP prompts (optionally filtered by category/tag).

commands.name: jfp-search
commands.description: Search JFP prompts by query.

commands.name: jfp-show
commands.description: Show a JFP prompt by ID.

commands.name: jfp-status
commands.description: Get JeffreysPrompts (JFP) health status.

commands.name: jfp-suggest
commands.description: Get JFP prompt suggestions for a task.

commands.name: jfp-tags
commands.description: List JFP tags with counts.

commands.name: jfp-update
commands.description: Update JFP registry cache.

commands.name: mail
commands.description: Get Agent Mail state.

commands.name: ms-search
commands.description: Search Meta Skill catalog.

commands.name: ms-show
commands.description: Show Meta Skill details by ID.

commands.name: palette
commands.description: Query palette commands.

commands.name: proxy-status
commands.description: Get rust_proxy daemon status, route metrics, and failover history.

commands.name: rano-stats
commands.description: Get per-agent network stats via rano.

parameters.name: panes
parameters.description: Comma-separated pane indices to filter (applies across sessions)

commands.name: rch-status
commands.description: Get RCH status summary including worker counts.

commands.name: rch-workers
commands.description: List RCH workers with status details.

parameters.name: worker
parameters.description: Filter to a specific worker name

commands.name: replay
commands.description: Replay command from history.

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Restore session from saved state.

commands.name: ru-sync
commands.description: Run ru sync and return JSON summary.

commands.name: save
commands.description: Save session state for later restore.

commands.name: setup-status
commands.description: Alias for --robot-acfs-status.

commands.name: slb-approve
commands.description: Approve an SLB request by ID.

commands.name: slb-deny
commands.description: Deny an SLB request by ID.

commands.name: slb-pending
commands.description: List pending SLB approval requests.

commands.name: tokens
commands.description: Get token usage analytics.

parameters.name: tokens-group-by
parameters.description: Grouping: agent, model, day, week, month

commands.name: tools
commands.description: Get tool inventory and health status.

commands.name: version
commands.description: Get ntm version, commit, and build info.
